nasb.text: The man named Barabbas had been imprisoned with the insurrectionists who had committed murder in the insurrection.

esv.text: And among the rebels in prison, who had committed murder in the insurrection, there was a man called Barabbas.

cnv.text: 有一個人名叫巴拉巴，和作亂的人囚禁在一起，他們作亂的時候，曾殺過人。

ccb.text: 那时，有一个囚犯名叫巴拉巴，与其他作乱时杀过人的囚犯关在一起。

csbs.text: 那时，有一个叫巴拉巴的，和一同叛乱的人被关在牢里，他们在暴乱中杀过人。
